summary: Iteration 28 - Tested NEW Weekly Digest Email feature. All 12 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend tests passed. Weekly Digest section on Fan Analytics page shows Preview/Send buttons. Preview modal displays branded HTML email with streaming stats, top markets, top platforms, AI insights. Settings > Notifications tab shows 'Weekly Performance Digest' toggle. Fixed minor bug: notification-preferences endpoint now returns email_weekly_digest field for existing users.

issues: Console warnings about chart width/height being -1 during initial render - cosmetic only, charts render correctly

passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/digest/send requires authentication (returns 401/422 without token)
Backend: POST /api/digest/send returns stats: streams_this_week, streams_last_week, growth, top_countries, insights_included
Backend: POST /api/digest/preview requires authentication (returns 401/422 without token)
Backend: POST /api/digest/preview returns HTML containing 'KALMORI', 'Weekly', streaming stats
Backend: POST /api/digest/preview HTML has proper structure (This Week, Last Week, Growth sections)
Backend: GET /api/digest/history requires authentication (returns 401/422 without token)
Backend: GET /api/digest/history returns list of previously sent digests
Frontend: Fan Analytics page (/fan-analytics) shows 'Weekly Digest Email' section with data-testid='weekly-digest-section'
Frontend: 'Preview' button (data-testid='preview-digest-btn') opens modal showing digest email HTML
Frontend: Digest preview modal shows KALMORI branding, streaming stats, top markets, top platforms, AI insights
Frontend: 'Send Now' button (data-testid='send-digest-btn') triggers digest send with loading state
Frontend: Toast notification shows 'Digest generated' message after send
Frontend: Settings > Notifications tab shows 'Weekly Performance Digest' toggle (data-testid='pref-email_weekly_digest')
Frontend: Toggle (data-testid='toggle-email_weekly_digest') can enable/disable weekly digest emails
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed bug: GET /api/settings/notification-preferences now returns email_weekly_digest field for existing users (added default value fallback)
Digest HTML is ~8KB with gradient header, 3-column stats, top markets/platforms tables, AI insights, release badges, CTA button
Email delivery shows 'pending' since Resend sender domain may not be verified - endpoint logic and HTML generation work correctly
All data-testid attributes properly implemented for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 28 tested the NEW Weekly Digest Email feature. Backend endpoints: POST /api/digest/send (sends digest email, logs to digest_log collection), POST /api/digest/preview (returns HTML preview), GET /api/digest/history (returns sent digest history). Notification preferences updated to include email_weekly_digest field. Frontend: Weekly Digest section on Fan Analytics page (data-testid='weekly-digest-section') with Preview/Send buttons. Preview modal shows branded HTML email. Settings > Notifications tab has 'Weekly Performance Digest' toggle. Fixed minor bug where email_weekly_digest wasn't returned for existing users. All previous AI endpoints still work (regression verified).

mocked_apis.Resend Email: CONFIGURED but sender domain may not be verified - endpoint logic works, email delivery pending
mocked_apis.AI Smart Insights: NOT MOCKED - uses real Emergent LLM Key (GPT-4o)
mocked_apis.AI Release Strategy: NOT MOCKED - uses real Emergent LLM Key (GPT-4o)
mocked_apis.PDF Export: NOT MOCKED - uses real reportlab library

response.message: Weekly digest sent! or Digest generated but email delivery pending

components: Weekly Digest Email title and subtitle

frontend_settings_notification_toggle.label: Weekly Performance Digest
frontend_settings_notification_toggle.description: AI-powered weekly email with streaming trends, top markets, and growth recommendations

bug_fixed.issue: GET /api/settings/notification-preferences did not return email_weekly_digest for existing users
bug_fixed.root_cause: Existing users had notification preferences stored without the new email_weekly_digest field
bug_fixed.fix: Added default value fallback in get_notification_prefs endpoint to ensure new fields have defaults for existing users
